god that art. that pfp. ive been obsessed with it ever since i first saw it a few months ago. i love everything about it, his facial expression, the coloring, the VIDEO ❤️❤️❤️ im genuinely not joking when i say this is THE BEST piece of phighting fanart ive ever had the PLEASURE of laying my eyes upon😻😻🤤🤤 idc it took me five quadrillion years to find the artist, atp i might just open a tiktok account JUST to follow them because their artstyle tickles my neurons in all the right places holy shit🤩🤩

okay enough glazing hi shuriken nation my new favorite genders besides katatas😊😊😊 here i am back with YET another shitty bot drop i didn't put much effort into!

shuriken hits you over the head with a metal pipe asmr 😋😋 anyway this was a VERY self indulgent bot i kinda feel weird releasing it but oh well 😁

look forward to uhhhhh something something bot im kinda out of ideas ngl, i really want to make a biograft bot but he talks like a fucking idiot with jai llm idk how to fix it
